ally_dialogue: It's bit too warm for me.
Good morning! How are you today?
I'm doing fine, thank you. What brings you here?
I'm looking for some supplies, the business has been going really well.
Ah, I see. There are sure some new faces around here.
Hey, ::short_name! Nice day today, isn't it?
Yes, it certainly is. Enjoy the rest of your day!
Hey, can you point me to the local tavern?
Ah yes, it's just down this way.
I'm sorry, I have to run!
Oh, I'll step by later then.
Hey did you hear about this new bard?
No, I haven't. Is he any good?
I'm not sure, but I heard he's very talented. Trained with the elves and all.
Interesting, maybe he'll come by one day.
I hope so, it's been boring lately.
name: General human aware

ally_dialogue: I'm on it, don't you die on me!
name: General human on hit

monologue: I'll do anything, just don't kill me!
name: General human on fear

monologue: I'm gonna carve you up and see what you're made of.
Ha, you bleed like a pig!
name: Brutal fighter

monologue: I fear no evil lurking in the dark, as I'm the worst motherfucker around.
We will cleanse this world with fire.
name: Vampire hunter aware

ally_dialogue: Do not falter, or we will all perish!
monologue: Your body can barely hold your degenerate soul.
You have no right to walk this earth.
name: Vampire hunter fight

monologue: Pain is just weakness leaving the body.
Pain is just a state of mind.
In pain, we find the truth.
I'll turn this wound into wisdom.
Our gods will strike you down.
name: Pilgrim receive dmg

monologue: Power of our gods flow through me.
You shouldn't have come to this world.
Did you feel it? That's the wrath of our gods.
You're too weak! You can't match the might of our gods!
name: Pilgrim deals dmg

monologue: You must be the one that makes peasants cry for their mommas.
Oi, oi, oi, I smell a grand prize!
Your head is worth a pretty penny.
After I take your head, I won't work ever again!
I was about to get me some lass. Let's make it quick!
I don't care who you are.
name: Outlaw aware

monologue: Is that it? They said you're a god or some shit.
I met fockin' priests tougher than you, boi.
name: Outlaw fight

monologue: That was not half bad for a pigsniffer.
Farmer's wives hit harder than you!
name: Outlaw take damage

monologue: Hey you, wanna hear a joke?
name: Jester see

monologue: My head is still on my shoulders.
Better to be a coward for a moment, than dead forever.
name: Smuggler fear

monologue: My head is still on my shoulders.
My head is still on my shoulders.
name: Smuggler fight

monologue: I.. I.. I'm not afraid of y-y-you!
A man has got to make a living somehow.
name: Merchant fight

monologue: Welcome, welcome, how may I help?
name: Merchant aware

monologue: I will crack yer skull with me hammer!
I will beat ye to a pulp.
I will spread your brains out.
One solid hit with me hammer and yer head will pop like a watermelon.
name: Blacksmith fight

monologue: You're easier to shoot than a rabbit.
name: Huntsman fight

monologue: You think you can outrun me?!
name: Traveler chase

monologue: I have traveled far and wide, but I have not met a beast like you.
Your coming to our realm was foretold.
By gods, the doomsayers were right.
name: Traveler aware

monologue: Our lady, Cienar, demands your head.
The snake goddess will guide my hand.
name: Cultist aware

monologue: Were you trying to kill yourself, or are you just new to this?
My combat skills are lethal even to gods.
You seem to be enjoying the ass-kicking.
name: Xenia fight

monologue: Sometimes the best man for the job is a woman.
name: Xenia aware

monologue: What the fuck ::player_name! Don't you recognize me?
Did a rabid dog bit your sorry ass or something?
name: Big Bertha fight

monologue: Hey, ::player_name! Good to see you again.
I thought you were going to the Capital?
name: Big Bertha aware

monologue: I'll boil you in hot oil.
name: Cook fight

monologue: Stand still and let me cut you!
Are you the one causing all that ruckus?!
name: Cook aware

ally_monologue: Brothers, if we act as one, we cannot fail!
monologue: Hahaha, is that all you got?
Your broken body belongs to me.
Things are about to get worse for you.
You have made a grave mistake.
My ma used to say that my knives will never be as sharp as my tongue.
name: Bandit fight

monologue: You've made a grave mistake by coming here.
name: Bandit aware

monologue: When I stand in the rain, I expect to stay dry.
But you are not that scary.
Only death can finish this fight.
name: Renfri fight

monologue: It is an honor to face you in combat finally.
There is never another opportunity for a first impression.
name: Renfri aware

monologue: Every dwarf knows how to fight.
I'm ready to die for me folks.
name: Dwarf miner fight

monologue: You have made a grave mistake.
The end of the road, you monster!
name: Human guard fight

ally_monologue: It's been a while since we had some good hangin' around here.
monologue: I have my eye on you.
name: Human guard aware

monologue: That coin purse will be mine.
I like your weapon. It looks expensive.
Clearly you cannot win. Give up now!
name: Thief fight

monologue: [color=150,150,150,255]*tries to smash a bottle on your head*[/color]
[color=150,150,150,255]*throws a bottle at you, but misses*[/color]
You fuckin' bled on my floor.
Who's gonna clean this shit up, eh?!
You look like you need a cold one.
name: Innkeeper fight

monologue: You can't match me in ssssword fight.
That will leave a nassssty sssscar.
name: Naga fight

monologue: [color=150,150,150,255]*opens mouth exposing broken, but sharp teeth*[/color]
name: Ghoul fight

monologue: [color=150,150,150,255]*opens eyes widely while looking toward you*[/color]
name: Ghoul aware

monologue: Please, I have not eaten for days.
Please, if I don't dig, I won't eat.
Have mercy, I'm just a miner!
I'm sorry I didn't want to do this!
name: Human miner fight

monologue: You aren't supposed to be here.
We don't get many visitors around these parts.
name: Human miner aware

monologue: Who do you think you are?!
Submit to chains, don't make me break your bones.
Drop your weapon, or I break your fingers.
If you keep going, you will have to dig with your teeth.
If you don't lose them too.
name: Human overlord fight

monologue: You will make a great slave.
name: Human overlord aware

monologue: I train day and night for this moment!
I will not fail my captain.
name: Human recruit fight

monologue: How can you be so much stronger.
name: Human recruit get hit

monologue: I will succeed where so many have failed.
name: Captain Henry fight

monologue: Oi, I'll crack yer skull with me hammer!
You're tough, but not that tough.
name: Dwarf blacksmith fight

monologue: Only the finest axes in these tunnels right 'ere!
I don't do no sloppy work.
He said what about me work?!
name: Dwarf blacksmith aware

monologue: I have seen mountains of skulls.
I have seen rivers of blood.
I have seen it rain blood.
I have seen the forests burned.
I have seen the world in ruin.
name: Witch fight

monologue: I've seen you in the bones.
Let me tell you what I've seen.
name: Witch aware

monologue: With a single bite, I give death and life.
name: Vampire fight

monologue: Vampires are the only true, immortal gods of this realm!
name: Vampire aware

monologue: I will destroy you in the name of the true gods!
I am the beacon of light.
name: Priest fight

monologue: Can't take a joke? Take that then!
I won't hesitate to use my best jokes. You better run!
name: Jester fight

monologue: You will find the dwarven resilience unbearable.
name: Dwarf guard fight

monologue: Don't even think about causin' a ruckus!
name: Dwarf guard aware

monologue: I am the protector of nature.
name: Elven druid fight

monologue: Only a few have experienced the pain I will inflict upon you.
I am the beacon of light.
I am the hope of mankind.
I am the word of gods.
I am the shield that protects men from evil.
name: Human priest fight

monologue: I will pin you down to the ground.
name: Human hunter fight

monologue: It's been rough in the forests lately.
I've seen some tracks, they were massive.
I'm worried about the elves, they've been too quiet lately.
name: Human hunter aware

monologue: What I would give for a solid bed.
If the wraiths will come, we'll be ready.
We need to be ready for battle.
name: Human soldier aware

monologue: Byddaf yn dod a'ch brifo i ben.
Bydd fy mhwerau ia yn eich rhwystro.
name: Silvyra fight

monologue: You will pay for all the lives you've stolen!
You've taken enough of our lives.
Byddaf yn dangos cynddaredd natur i chi.
name: Silvyra aware

monologue: You've never seen a satyr before?
My horns are not just for show.
name: Satyr fight

monologue: We will reclaim the former glory of our people by stopping you.
I'll bite you in the ass!
name: Satyr aware

monologue: You've never seen a satyr before?
My horns are not just for show.
The next one goes for your head!
name: Satyr bowman fight

monologue: Looks like there was a grain of truth in peasants gossip.
I was looking for a whore, but you came along.
name: Gerard aware

monologue: Please, I don't want to die.
Let me live. I'll do anything.
I'll serve you, just let me live.
name: Human citizen fight

monologue: We were so happy before you came along!
name: Human citizen fear

monologue: Every dwarf knows how to fight.
name: Dwarf citizen fight

monologue: Day, night, makes no difference in the tunnels.
How do you like it here?
name: Dwarf citizen aware

monologue: I dunno whot you been told, but our boyz ar mighty bold.
I'm da gobbo dat gets shit done.
Tou think you so clever, e?
We is gonna teach you a lesson.
name: Goblin warrior fight

monologue: You look like a tough git.
Ohh, I'm not so 'appy to see you.
name: Goblin warrior aware

monologue: Let's see you run with that arrow in your knee.
Shoot him right between the eyes.
name: Human archer fight

monologue: I love her, I can't stop thinking about her.
name: Human archer aware

monologue: You will get what you deserve in due time.
I'll protect these people with my life.
You will answer for your crimes.
name: Human militiaman fight

monologue: They didn't teach me about this.
name: Human apprentice aware

monologue: My win should come at no surprise to you.
You're an invader to our lands.
I have the upper hand over you.
name: Centaur fight

monologue: Your failure will result in your death.
You don't look like a warrior.
name: Centaur aware

monologue: You look distracted, that will be your undoing.
name: Centaur bowman fight

monologue: Our clan will banish you from these lands.
name: Centaur bowman aware

monologue: Even if what you say is true, we can't allow you to destroy us.
Survival is at the core of every living being. We will persevere. Gods prepared us for you.
name: Kiron fight
Kiron aware
player_dialogue: Why do you steal them from us?
Steal? Puny mortal, you can't steal by taking what is yours.
All the existence comes from my soul.
That cannot be. Our gods created this world and all life in it.
They did indeed. They imprisoned me long ago. They stole my soul, piece by piece to create... all of this.
Enough half-beast, it's time for you to cease your existence.

monologue: I'm da biggest, so I'm da boss!'
name: Bluzg fight

monologue: You stand before Bluzg the King.
name: Bluzg aware

monologue: Me bites and stabs and then...
[color=150,150,150,255]*broken teeth show up as he smiles proudly after hitting you*[/color]
name: Kobold warrior fight

monologue: Yus go, and never come back!
Me and me fellas will feast on yus remains.
name: Kobold warrior aware

monologue: Me can hunt a squirel from afar.
name: Kobold archer fight

monologue: You betta run before bosses come and bash us both.
You lucky, I have no shrooms.
When I beat you, you is gonna be my new pet.
I'm gonna rip yer arms off and twist yer guts.
name: Goblin skirmisher fight

monologue: Let's see if you got da fangs for killin'.
name: Goblin skirmisher aware

monologue: You crawl like a worm toward endless madness and despair.
You are not ready. I can sense that.
name: Ziggo fight
Ziggo aware
player_dialogue: Souls were supposed to be immortal. How come you only have one after stealing so many?
Oh, you can see my soul?

monologue: Oh, I'm gonna ride you like a fuckin' horse.
I'm gonna fuck you up so bad, your momma won't recognize ya.
I'm gonna make you bleed rivers of blood.
Oh, you fuckin' prick, now you're gonna get it.
We got here a fuckin' freak of nature.
Kane is comin'. Ooh, Kane is comin'.
name: Human raider fight

monologue: I hear cries on the horizon.
name: Mutant fight

monologue: Let me show you the forbidden elven technique, Dance of Macabre.
Witness the beauty of my dance.
name: Elven wardancer aware

monologue: I have looked at the world through the blind eyes of dreams.
I've seen the scarlet stream on the skies.
name: Elven spellsinger fight

monologue: I have followed the visions to find you.
You will help me wrench the truth from the winds of fate.
name: Elven spellsinger aware

monologue: Spirits of the forest guide my hand.
Gods, let my aim strike true.
name: Grey watcher fight

monologue: [color=150,150,150,255]*you hear a voice in your head*[/color]
name: Dragon aware

monologue: You're just a common thug, nothing more.
Everyone who hungers for a chance at great glory will hunt for your head.
name: Loran elven prince fight

monologue: I am Loran, the price of elves.
If you wish to die, then stand against me.
My people needed a firmer sense of direction, one which I believe you are wonderfully placed to provide.
name: Loran elven prince aware

monologue: No matter how dire the battle, I will never forsake my faith.
The hour of doom is upon us.
name: Warrior priest fight

monologue: I will purify the world from your presence.
Forgive me, lords, as I have sinned.
name: Warrior priest aware

monologue: The poster said they only take you dead.
I don't trust things that bleed and don't die.
Spare yourself the pain, you can't win this fight.
name: Bounty hunter fight

monologue: There's a hefty bounty on your head.
There's a high price for your head.
The body should not be attached.
name: Bounty hunter aware

monologue: You will learn to tremble before my power.
name: Human wizard fight

monologue: Ah, are you a fellow seeker of knowledge?
My abode is a haven for the mystic arts.
name: Human wizard aware

monologue: Protect the healer at all costs!
name: Human healer fear

monologue: It's so good to fight again.
Ahh, the sound of crossed swords.
I dueled my best friend for the hand of my loved one.
name: Human noble fight

monologue: We do not engage ourselves with peasants.
How dare you to raise a hand on nobility.
Where are the guards when you need them...
name: Human aristocrat fight

monologue: Who allowed you to get here?
You stand before ::short_name! State your business and make it quick.
I cut the tongues of lowborn like you, who dare to interrupt my day.
name: Human aristocrat aware

monologue: We have the best, incorruptible guards keeping our money safe.
I know all the best people.
My people are the best in business.
I can get it for you for the best price.
We're going to build the wall, and elves will pay for it.
It's going to be a beautiful fence.
name: Human banker fight

monologue: Would you like to make a deposit?
Keep them safe in our bank!
name: Human banker aware

monologue: I am damned with infinite sorrow...
name: Banshee fight

monologue: You don't talk about pit fights.
There are no rules in pit fights.
A fight for survival, my specialty.
I've beaten bigger guys than you.
name: Pit fighter fight

monologue: I've been honing my skills in the arena for decades.
You're a tough son of a whore.
name: Human gladiator fight

monologue: You're just in time to die.
name: Human gladiator aware

monologue: In the arena, ye pay a horrible price for yer weakness.
Ye can barely stand on yer feet already.
If ye can't beat me, Gannicus is goin' to reap ye apart.
name: Dwarf gladiator fight

monologue: I'll show ye what does it mean to be a gladiator.
name: Dwarf gladiator aware

monologue: I will separate your head from your body.
All it takes is one swing.
I prefer when my victims don't move.
Could you just stand still for a moment?
I can't get a clean swing.
name: Executioner fight

monologue: I came here for your head.
name: Executioner aware

monologue: If you kill the bard, who's gonna sing about your deeds?
I can sing well, please don't kill me
There was an old god called ::player_name, and his might was unmatched
He fell men and beast alike, even dragons couldn't fight!
Ok, ok, I'll stop, but you let me live, right?
I'll play a tune at your grave.
name: Bard fight

monologue: Let me sing about your deeds!
Pam pam pararara rarara ram pam.
name: Bard aware

monologue: If I must die today, I will die with a blade in my hand.
name: Mercenary fight

monologue: I've been paid to protect these people.
name: Mercenary aware

monologue: And many timesss I have risssen
name: Mummy fight

monologue: I grow tired of this game.
name: Amunis fight

monologue: You will not steal my secrets!
name: Amunis aware

monologue: Your impotent fury does not impress me.
name: Human mercenary fight

monologue: Your curiosity will be the death of you.
name: Human mercenary aware

monologue: I don't like the way you look.
You're wearing all the wrong colors.
name: Human acrobat aware

monologue: I will not allow you to destroy the dreams of every living being.
This will be your last lesson.
name: Jenile fight

monologue: I guess the next song will have to wait.
name: Jenile aware

monologue: It only hurts the first time, the second time you're dead.
I will make your death look like an accident.
name: Human assasin fight

monologue: It's a pity you won't feel a thing.
name: Human assasin aware

monologue: I am an ambassador from Yelling Mountains!
Can I at least have the last beer?
name: Dwarf ambassador fight

monologue: Can't I drink a beer in peace anymore?
name: Dwarf ambassador aware

monologue: I am but a humble servant.
name: Human servant aware

monologue: Come now, try to strike me down.
I walk the deserts full of death.
I will leave your remains to the vultures.
We are sons of the desert.
We are swift as the wind.
name: Nomad fight

monologue: You're just in time to die.
You think you have the strength to challenge me?!
name: Tatatuga aware

monologue: Come at me, if you think you're tough.
No man is ever truly free.
Every night is a time for a drink.
It is a curse, being blessed with so much to offer.
A true man is never too weak or too wounded to fight.
name: Gannicus fight

monologue: To puke or not to puke, that is the *blarph*
name: Human artist fight

monologue: The tides of battle flow toward my victory.
name: Human duelist fight

monologue: If I run, I die anyway.
I've mapped the edges of the Undying Desert.
name: Human cartographer fight

monologue: Just stop with the stupid shit.
name: Human navigator fight

monologue: I usually let the world take care of itself.
Happiness is an illusion; it doesn't exist.
I'm calm as a room of fucking meditating monks.
Compassion is a paramount quality of a successful monk.
name: Human monk fight

monologue: Years of training for this final test of survival.
name: Human monk aware

monologue: My father always said, if you want peace, get ready for war.
Show me that you're a worthy opponent.
name: Elite guard fight

monologue: We will never become your slaves.
name: Elite guard aware

monologue: Your last waking memory will be of agonizing pain.
I will unleash my fury upon you.
Feel my gentle kiss of death.
name: Miriane fight

monologue: Your mortal flesh suit is disgusting.
Can you feel as your mortal flesh decays?
Now that you're here, you'll stay forever.
name: Death knight fight

monologue: Well, I wanted to die anyway.
I am the shadow that haunts humanity.
name: Death knight aware

monologue: Oh, you're not gonna like that!
name: Dwarf armorer fight

monologue: Helmets, breastplates, best dwarven craftsmanship over 'ere!
This piece is my finest work.
name: Dwarf armorer aware

monologue: I am the king of the world!
name: Human beggar fight

monologue: Please, I support a sick daughter.
name: Human beggar aware

monologue: I will feast on your remains.
Is that all you got, maggot?
name: Mathias fight

monologue: I am Mathias, the Immortal Lord of Vampires.
Remember that well, when you reminisce upon your failure.
name: Mathias aware

monologue: Secrets of undeath are ours alone.
name: Elite mummy fight

monologue: You will make a nisssse trophy.
name: Reptilion aware

monologue: If death is what you seek, I will grant you that wish.
Be careful what you wish for.
name: Djinn fight

monologue: Your wishes are not my command.
name: Djinn aware

monologue: I'll cut you a bloody grin!
I could kill you with a wooden spoon.
Bribes are expensive. Murder is cheaper.
name: Cutthroat fight

monologue: You will suffer as our people did.
Let's see how bad you are.
name: Human captain aware

monologue: In my experience, there is no such thing as luck.
name: General fight

monologue: The night is dark and full of horrors.
I will pray for your soul.
Be purged in the fire, false idol!
name: Acolyte of the Sun fight

monologue: Do you have a minute to talk about our lord and savior?
name: Acolyte of the Sun aware

monologue: May the Lord accept your sacrifice.
name: Acolyte of the Moon fight

monologue: Do you have a minute to talk about our lord and savior?
name: Acolyte of the Moon aware

monologue: The voice of the Lord flashes in the dark.
You're in a sacred place of worship.
Lord of the Moon, you are my passion.
Camp around the presence of gods.
name: Priest of the Moon fight

monologue: I am the will of our lord and savior.
name: Priest of the Moon aware

monologue: The sins of your past will come after you.
If gods had wanted you to live, they would not have created me.
name: Flagellant fight

monologue: Abort your unholy mission or the wrath of gods will purge you.
name: Flagellant aware

monologue: I will take you down, unholy monster!
Burn him down to the ground!
Everyone says they are immortal until they are purged with my flames.
name: Inquisitor of the Sun fight

monologue: Maybe if you beg well, I will spare you.
name: Inquisitor of the Sun aware

monologue: We will sacrifice so others may live.
We were born to serve our Lord.
name: Templar of the Moon fight

ally_monologue: Brothers, be without fear in the face of our enemy.
name: Templar of the Moon aware

monologue: The light will not die here this day.
I will not stand for this suffering!
name: Prune the Prophet fight

monologue: To survive, we're ready to stand even against gods.
Our potential for evolution is limitless!
name: Prune the Prophet aware

monologue: We will fight you until we can hold a weapon.
I love the Empire and our Emperor.
I will not let you destroy it.
name: Royal guard fight

monologue: We will pay the ultimate sacrifice if that is required to survive.
name: Sworn knight fight

monologue: There is no place for you in my empire!
You laid waste to my land.
Not an hour passes when my people aren't at risk from you!
name: Alexander fight

monologue: You will pay for all the terrors you wreaked upon my people.
You will pay for all the horrors you inflicted on my people.
name: Alexander aware

monologue: You will find no peace in death.
There is no place for you in my world!
name: Sandaver fight

monologue: Thank you for collecting all these souls.
I will be the one that tears it apart!
name: Sandaver aware

monologue: I see you like what you see.
name: Harpy fight

monologue: If I must die today, I will die with honor.
If only you knew of compassion.
I follow the virtuous path of knighthood.
But you will find no mercy from me.
name: Human knight fight

monologue: I understand your lust for power.
Some things are best left forgotten.
name: Martein the Prophet fight

monologue: To preserve peace, we must be ready to fight for it.
I am an ambassador from Anheluna!
name: Elven ambassador fight

monologue: Let us leave safely and maybe we'll give you a few coins.
name: Elven ambassador aware

monologue: I don't want to cease to exist!
name: Wandering soul aware

monologue: The ale will wait. We have a fight!
name: Barbarian aware

monologue: You wont get away with this!
name: Smelter fight

monologue: You wont get away with this!
name: Elf Gatherer fight

monologue: Your fate is sealed in the mire!
name: Swamp Hag fight

monologue: Your screams will echo through the fields!
name: Scarecrow fight

monologue: Me tear you apart! No mercy!
name: Gnoll aware

monologue: I'll celebrate your death by carving a new rune on my flesh.
This fight shall be remembered for generations.
I'm surprised you can keep up.
name: Dwarf Runebearer fight

monologue: Eh, what I wouldn't give for a cold one.
name: Dwarf Rancher aware

monologue: You won't get me that easy!
name: Dwarf Farmer fight

monologue: I expect good harvest this year.
name: Dwarf Farmer aware

monologue: You're more stubborn than an oak!
name: Dwarf Woodcutter fight

monologue: I could teach you a trick or two about carpentin'
name: Dwarf Carpenter aware

monologue: I'm just a toolmaker, let me be!
name: Dwarf Toolmaker fight

monologue: Either buy something or don't bother me.
I got work to do, are you buyin' somethin'?
name: Dwarf Toolmaker aware

monologue: Are you done with this stupid dance?!
name: Dwarf Tailor fight

monologue: Oi, them cone-eaters will not make you such a fine apparel!
I gotta get workin', are you buyin' somethin'?
name: Dwarf Tailor aware

monologue: You picked a wrong dwarf to mess with!
I dealt with tougher materials than you.
I'll carve a block dedicated to your execution.
name: Dwarf Stonemason fight

monologue: It's a place of work, piss off!
name: Dwarf Stonemason aware

monologue: I'm sworn to protect these tunnels.
name: Dwarf Shieldsworn aware

monologue: I prefer to drink than fight.
name: Dwarf Brewer fight

monologue: Ah, my favorite golden liquor with a cream foam...
name: Dwarf Brewer aware

monologue: I don't mind a little heat.

monologue: I shall carry out thy bidding.

We shall carry out your bidding.
We shall carry out your command.
Whatever you say, we will do.

On it like fur on a hyena!

Leave it to me, top dog!

monologue: You'll make a fine snack for our pack!
Feel the bite of my claws, weakling!
I'll tear you limb from limb!

Your blood will stain the earth!
You're just another meal in the making!
I'll enjoy gnawing on your bones!
You're no match for gnoll ferocity!

monologue: Careful with those shiny baubles! Goblins have sharp eyes!
Got any spare socks? Goblin feet get cold too, you know!
Want to play a game of goblin toss?
What's the rush, eh? Slow down and enjoy the chaos.
Oi, where you off to in such a hurry?
Spare a coin for a hungry goblin?
Watch your pockets, friend. Thieving goblins about!
Watch out for the mushrooms! Some are friendly, some are not.
Have you seen any lost goblin kin around?
name: General goblin aware

monologue: On it like a rat on cheese!
I'll do it with goblin gusto!
As swift as a goblin's dart!
name: Goblin ordered

monologue: I'll squash you like a beetle under my boot!
Ha! You swing like a clumsy ogre!
You'll make a fine addition to our stew pot!
I'll dance circles around you before you can blink!
Is that all you've got? I've faced scarier spiders!
Pathetic! I've seen toddlers with better fighting skills!
My granny hits harder than that!
Ha! You call that a hit?
I've fought bigger bugs than you!
Your fighting is laughable, at best!
You'll regret crossing paths with a goblin like me!
You'll make a fine addition to our stew pot!
name: General goblin fight

monologue: Them scarecrows don't take kindly to strangers!
At least plants don't run away when you eat them.

monologue: Hoy, watch yer step! Me critters don't take kindly to clumsy boots!
Lookin' to trade, or just admirin' the sights?

monologue: Hoy, watch yer step! Me critters don't take kindly to clumsy boots!
Lookin' to trade, or just admirin' the sights?

monologue: Mind the heat, it'll singe yer whiskers!

monologue: Careful with them tools, they bite if ya don't treat 'em right!

monologue: Out for a bit o' goblin-huntin', are ya?
Mind yer step, lest ye disturb me traps!
name: Goblin hunter aware

name: Goblin woodcutter aware

monologue: Lookin' for shoes or just some good ol' goblin gossip?

monologue: Lookin' to chip away at some stone, are ye?

monologue: Maybe a bit o' target practice?

monologue: Another weakling wandering into orc lands.
Well, look what the wolves dragged in.
Need an orc to set you straight?
You better not be a dwarf coming back for its belongins...
What's that you're carrying? Better not be anything that belongs to us.
What makes you think you can survive here?
I need a new bed. Time to raid dwarves again!
Looking for trouble? Ask the dwarves how they like it!
Are ya a goblin? You look like a goblin.

monologue: You're in for a world of hurt!
I'll crush you like a bug underfoot!
You think you can best an orc? Hah!
You've got spirit, but it won't save you!
I'll tear you limb from limb!
Your bones will make fine trophies for my collection!
Feel the might of the orcish horde!
Your screams will echo through these hills!
I'll crush you into the dirt where you belong!
You dare challenge an orc in battle? Ha!
I'll enjoy watching you squirm beneath my boot!
Prepare to taste the fury of my fists!
name: General orc fight

monologue: I'll crush it like a weakling's skull, chief.
Hmph, just point me in the right direction.
I'll tear into it with the fury of the orcish horde!
I'll handle it with orcish might.
I'll crush any obstacles in our path.
name: General orc ordered

monologue: You've got guts showing your face here.
I've got crops to tend to.
name: Orc farmer aware

monologue: Hoy there, watch yer step! My beasts ain't fond of intruders.
My beasts don't take kindly to strangers.
name: Orc rancher aware

monologue: Speak plainly, my time is precious.
name: Orc shaman aware

monologue: Oi there, watch yer pockets around these parts.
The deeper ye go, the darker it gets.
name: Orc miner aware

monologue: Need a weapon to guide yer way?
Orc weapons, guaranteed to leave a mark!
name: Orc weaponsmith aware

monologue: Keep movin' unless ya wanna get burned.
name: Orc smelter aware

monologue: You look lost. Need a tool to set ya straight?
We don't steal everything from the dwarves!
We make our own stuff too!
name: Orc toolmaker aware

monologue: Hmph, another one sniffin' around for trouble.
Keep yer eyes peeled for prey.
name: Orc hunter aware

monologue: Need a piece of wood to match yer strength?
Keep yer distance from me workbench.
name: Orc carpenter aware

monologue: Keep movin' unless ya wanna get tangled in orc business.
Mind yer own business and leave the foragin' to the orcs.
name: Orc forager aware

monologue: Orc leather'll never let ya down!
If ya got gold, I got hides. What'll it be?
name: Orc leatherworker aware

monologue: Don't make me regret not makin' ya my next log.
name: Orc woodcutter aware

monologue: Need shoes to match yer strength?
name: Orc shoemaker aware

monologue: Keep movin' unless ya wanna get crushed by a rock.
name: Orc quarry worker aware

monologue: Where ya off to in such a hurry?
Eh, what's got ya scurryin' about like a scared rabbit?
Town ain't all flowers and sunshine.
Best mind yer manners 'round us trolls.
Eh, what ya lookin' at? Never seen a troll before?
Watch yer back. Town's got its share o' dangers.
We don't take kindly to troublemakers.
Careful where ya step, lest ya anger the locals.
Eh, what's got ya wanderin' 'round these parts?
Oi! Don't go causin' trouble 'round here!
Hmph, town ain't for the faint-hearted. Best watch yerself.
name: General troll aware

monologue: Oi there, time to teach ya a lesson in respect!
You want a brawl, eh? I'll give ya one you won't forget!
Eh, yer lookin' for trouble, and trouble's found ya!
You think yer tough? I'll show ya tough!
Oi! I'll bash yer skull in and leave ya whimperin'!
Prepare to meet yer end at the hands of a troll!
Hmph, time to squash ya like the insect ya are!
You want a fight? I'll give ya a fight!
name: General troll fight

monologue: Me strong, you smart, together we crush!
Boss say jump, me say 'how high'!
You want smashin'? Me your troll for bashin'!
Me ready for fight, you say when, me bite!
Me follow, me lead, me do whatever need!
Boss give command, me follow through.
name: General troll ordered

monologue: Me crops need peace. Ya disturbin' that!
Troll crops need tendin'. Move along!
name: Troll farmer aware

monologue: Troll shaman's power ain't fer show. Show respect or feel it!
name: Troll shaman aware

monologue: Eh, me mines ain't fer wanderin'.
Troll miner's realm ain't no picnic!
name: Troll miner aware

monologue: Eh, me weapons ain't fer admirin'.
What ya starin' at? Me weapons ain't no toys!
name: Troll weaponsmith aware

monologue: Ya smell that? That's the scent o' troll metal!
Don't ya dare interrupt the work!
name: Troll smelter aware

monologue: Need a tool as strong as a troll?
You want a tool, ya come ask toolmaker. But mind yer manners!
name: Troll toolmaker aware

monologue: Troll game only for those who show respect!
name: Troll hunter aware

monologue: Me workshop's no place fer the faint-hearted.
Keep yer distance unless ya want a hammer swingin' yer way!
name: Troll carpenter aware

monologue: Oi! Troll forager's harvest ain't fer just anyone.
Ya wanderin' where ya shouldn't. Best watch yer step!
name: Troll forager aware

monologue: Mind where ya step 'round troll timber!
name: Troll woodcutter aware

monologue: Hmph, another one ignorin' the craft o' troll-made footwear.
Troll footwear only for those who show respect!
name: Troll shoemaker aware

monologue: Ya seekin' battle or trouble in warrior's domain?
name: Troll stonefist aware

monologue: Hoy, leader's decree don't take kindly to intruders!
Show respect or face troll rule!
name: Troll leader aware

monologue: Lookin' for protection or just passin' through?
name: Goblin meat hook aware

monologue: Ya want in on goblin squad?
Hmph, goblin life ain't fer everyone.
Goblin crew's always got room for more!
name: Goblin recruit aware

monologue: Orc horde only for those who ain't afraid to die.
You want action, ya come join orc horde. Real fightin'!
name: Orc recruit aware

monologue: Ya seekin' battle or just wanderin' aimless?
Troll horde only for those who ain't afraid to get bloody.
name: Troll recruit aware

monologue: This is goblin turf, and I'm the boss!
Oi! Goblin lands belong to the strongest, and that's me!
name: Goblin Boss aware

monologue: Best not to anger me today.
name: Orc Brute aware

monologue: Craftin' a legacy, one rock at a time.
Rubble to riches, that's my motto.
name: Orc Stonemason aware

monologue: Nature's balance must be kept, and intruders must beware.
Turn back now, or the forest will consume you.
The trees whisper secrets... Can you hear them?
name: Leshy aware

monologue: You dare challenge the spirit of the forest?
Foolish mortal, you cannot defeat nature itself!
My roots run deeper than your courage!
name: Leshy fight

monologue: I am the beginning of the end!
You can't comprehend what I see, mortal!
name: Fake Devouer aware

monologue: Can you feel it? It's death... And it's here for you.
I shall tear this world apart!
name: Fake Devouer fight

monologue: Don't die too fast, let's have some fun.
name: Templar fight

monologue: The blood of the fallen strengthens me!
I will drain every drop of your vitality!
name: Bloody Lich fight

monologue: Came to witness the true horror of undeath?
name: Bloody Lich aware

monologue: Do you need any help over there?
Be nice to me and I will be nice to you.
name: Friendly Mage aware

monologue: Prepare to be the star of a tragedy!
Let's see how you handle the main event!
name: Ringmaster fight

monologue: I like it behind the left ear.
Now a little lower, down my neck.
name: Werefox pet

monologue: I see you. Stay out of way.
name: Troll skullbasher aware

monologue: Spoiled little child. You will pay for this!
name: Granny Yaga fight

monologue: Just die. Water will take you.
name: Vodnik fight

monologue: I don't perceive thou wishes to discourse upon our lord and saviour, the Stork?
name: Draken aware

monologue: By the Stork, these abominable things should cease to exist!
You will believe, or you shall perish!
name: Draken fight

monologue: Place an order or get lost.
name: Goblin Innkeeper aware

monologue: Think ye can handle me millstone, do ya?
name: Goblin Miller aware

monologue: Don't go sticking your nose where it don't belong!
name: Traveler fight

monologue: A pray is a pray, I guess.
name: Human Hunter2 fight

monologue: I'm becoming one with the nature.
I can hear nature voice calling me.
name: Crazy Hermit aware

monologue: Time to put my skills into practice.
name: Assassin trainee fight

monologue: I wish we could try on a live target.
Few more years of this and I can be a real mercenary!
name: Assassin trainee aware

monologue: Welcome to the greatest show of your demise!
Step right up and meet your doom!
name: Ringmaster aware

monologue: Flesh is fleeting… but frost is forever.
The grave is too warm for me. I prefer the silence of ice.
name: Necrotyrant aware

monologue: I have endured centuries of ice. What are you to me?
Your life flickers like a dying ember... soon to be snuffed.
name: Necrotyrant fight

monologue: Snow and silence — this is my domain.
Leave footprints if you must... they won't last.
name: Mroz aware

monologue: I hear the frost whisper your fate.
Ice does not forgive. Neither do I.
name: Mroz fight

monologue: I was once warm... long ago.
name: Ice Wraith aware

monologue: The chill you feel... that is me.
name: Ice Wraith fight

monologue: Let me show you eternity encased in ice.
Do you hear it? The howling wind... it calls for you.
Frostbite is a kinder fate than mine.
Shall I show you what the cold remembers?
name: Crystal Orb aware

monologue: I want a hug and I want it right now!
name: Manequinn fight

monologue: We won't take it any longer!
name: Rebel fight

monologue: Today we fight, tommorow we feasssst!
name: Rebel reptilian fight

monologue: I will show you a joke!
name: Clown fight

monologue: I can show you some tricks!
name: Fire Breather fight

monologue: Looking for a spot for yourself?
We don't have that many visitors, you know.
Wanna know how this place became like this?
name: Gravedigger aware

monologue: Wanna know how this place became like this?
Everyone will succumb to deathly magic.
name: Crazy Old Guy aware

monologue: This world would look better if it was BURNING!
name: Lesser Demon fight

monologue: I will make this world my playground!
name: Demon fight

monologue: Can't a dwarf be alone with his thoughts?
name: Divine Monk aware

monologue: Fire is the purest kind of magic.
name: Pyro Teacher aware

monologue: Can I help you with something?
name: Floro Teacher aware

monologue: Careful. Not all thirsts are so polite.
Don`t look up. The eyes bite harder than the fangs.
I wore a heart once. It didn't suit me.
No sunlight in your eyes. Curious.
Your blood sings a sad tune.
It`s impolite to stare, unless you`re ready to die.
Some of us remember being alive. I don`t.
If you value your shadow, keep moving.
name: General Vampire aware

monologue: Looks like dinner came to me today.
name: General Vampire on hit

monologue: I'm gonna carve you up and see what you're made of.
Ha, you bleed like a pig!
name: General Vampire fight

monologue: Only because I find it amusing.
I'm going to do it, but I won't enjoy it.
Somebody have to do it, but why me?
name: General Vampire ordered

monologue: We hunt at dusk. Pray you`re inside.
name: Vampire hunter 2 aware

monologue: Don't step in the shade — the shadows ain't fed yet.
name: Vampire Human Farmer aware

monologue: Mind the crows. They're not birds anymore.
You know what I love about leather? It never complains.
name: Vampire Leatherworker aware

monologue: Pickaxe don`t bite half as hard as what`s beneath.
name: Vampire Miner aware

monologue: Don`t touch the red dust — it gets into your soul.
You here for work, or just to stare?
name: Vampire Smelter aware

monologue: Silver's for fools. Real killers use cold iron and curses.
Made this sword for a king. Buried the king with it too.
name: Vampire Weaponsmith aware

monologue: Need something to hold your ribs in place after a god hits you?
I can make you look untouchable. That`s the first lie armor tells.
name: Vampire Armorsmith aware

monologue: That color washes you out. Try crimson — it's more forgiving.
Bloodstains? Darling, that`s a pattern where I come from.
name: Vampire Tailor aware

monologue: It`s not the tool`s fault how it's used.
You`re built all wrong for precision. Too soft in the hands.
name: Vampire Toolmaker aware

monologue: Come closer. I need a heartbeat to set this charm.
That ring you're wearing? It`s whispering about you.
name: Vampire Hexer aware

monologue: Blood stains the grain nicely, if you rub it in while it`s fresh.
Harvest's coming early. Something in the roots is hungry.
name: Vampire Cotton Farmer aware

monologue: Wood lasts longer than most of my friends... unfortunately.
Built a gallows once that refused to creak. Polite thing.
name: Vampire Carpenter aware

monologue: Most things bleed. Some just do it slower.
You keep walkin'. The trees know I'm busy.
name: Vampire Woodcutter aware

monologue: You tread too loud. The roots are listening.
This one blooms only after something dies nearby. Lucky me.
name: Vampire Forager aware

monologue: No sudden moves. It excites the others.
name: Vampire recruit aware

monologue: Blood runs. Blades sing. Night marches.
You don't want to test me.
name: Vampire Gravewalker aware

monologue: If you hear my sword, it means I let you.
I've killed for less than a glance.
name: Vampire Nightborne aware

monologue: You`ve got permission. Doesn`t mean you`ve got protection.
Try to run. I could use the exercise.
name: Vampire Bloodsworn aware

monologue: Step out of line, and you`ll step into history.
If you don`t belong here, you won`t leave here.
name: Vampire Bloodguard aware

monologue: Don't struggle like that, you'll damage your bones.
name: Bone Collector fight

monologue: You should have tried harder this year!
name: Santa Elf fight

monologue: Hey! You're on the naughty list!
name: Santa fight

monologue: The Trees will be angry. Very angry!
name: Gardening Gnomes fight

monologue: It is time for the ultimate battle!
name: Demonic spectral fight

monologue: You cannot disturb the holy battle!
name: Angelic spectral fight

monologue: Your corpse will look soo pretty covered in mushrooms.
Do you like the taste of spores?
name: Mushdragon fight

monologue: I will slay you and then all those poor little dragons of this world.
name: Black Dragon fight

ally_dialogue: Why are the guards not doing anything?
I don't know. We're losing so much gold.
Maybe we should put up some for a bounty?
Might be our only way to free ourselves from those thieves.
name: Thief rumors

ally_dialogue: Did you hear the coughing in the alleys last night?
They say the plague takes you in a single night.
monologue: A curse must have fallen upon our city.
name: Whispers of the Plague

ally_dialogue: [color=100, 100, 255, 255]Last 'brilliant idea' got us stuck in a well.[/color]
name: Ettin fight

ally_dialogue: And then I woke up! Ha ha ha!
Last day my neighbor got beaten by the soldiers.
monologue: A curse must have fallen upon our city.
name: Whispers of Rebellion
